title: Top row: R and U
description: Reach UP to the top row — R (left index) and U (right index)
text: r r u u rug fur dark surf guard sugar rush hard gash
finger_focus: Index fingers reach up to R and U

tips.text: R is left index reaching UP, U is right index reaching UP
Reach up, then come straight back to F and J

tips.target: r r u u rug fur dark
tips.hint: Index fingers reach up to R and U

tips.text: New words: rug, fur, surf, guard

tips.hint: Index fingers reach up to R and U

character_tips.anna: R and U are your first top-row letters — index fingers up! 🌸
character_tips.maxim: Top row begins. R above F, U above J. Index reaches.
character_tips.knopych: LIFT OFF! 🚀 R and U — up and back!
character_tips.klavochka: Up you reach for R and U, then home again ✨
